mapper.select: SELECT slot.session_id, slot.id AS slot_id, slot.version AS slot_version, session.doctor_id, session.department_id, session.fee FROM clinic_slot slot JOIN clinic_session session ON session.id = slot.session_id WHERE slot.id = #{slotId} AND slot.session_id = #{sessionId} AND slot.deleted_at IS NULL AND slot.slot_status = 'AVAILABLE' AND session.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.session_status = 'OPEN'
SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) FROM clinic_slot WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND slot_status = 'AVAILABLE'
